Terms and Conditions:
I/We confirm the accuracy of the above information and agree to the following terms. 
1.
Check-in is at 3.00 pm, and check-out is at 12.00 pm. Early check-in/late check-out may incur additional fees.
2.
Extended stays are subject to availability and current rates. 
3.
Early departure may result in a one-night charge or more, depending on booking terms.
4.
The Hotel is not liable for valuables that have misplaced, stolen or left in guest rooms, meeting rooms, public areas, family or hotel
vehicles. 
5.
I/We agree to follow Hotel policies and all applicable laws in Bahrain.
6.
I/We are liable for damage caused to the hotel or guest property caused by myself/ourselves or my/our dependents, guests or 
visitor. Smoking in non-smoking rooms will result in a cleaning fee.
7.
All charges incurred during my/our stay, including room rate, taxes, damages, services or charges posted to the room folio, must 
be settled before check-out. I/We authorize the use of the credit card on file for payment.
8.
Personal cheques are not accepted. 
9.
I/We remain personally liable for all charges incurred during my/our stay, even if a third party is billed.
10.
I/We are solely responsible for supervising minors in my/our care and will not hold the Hotel liable for any incidents that may arise 
from improper use of facilities.
11.
I/We consent to the Hotel€™s collection, storage, use and sharing of my/our personal information for reservation processing, 
services, communication about my/our stay, promotions and future offers, improving Hotel facilities and compliance with legal 
requirements. This includes sharing information with affiliates, subsidiaries and partners. All personal information will be handled 
in line with our Privacy Policy available on our website.
Check here if I/we do not wish to receive these promotional communications. 
By signing below, I/we confirm that I/we have read, understood and agreed to these terms and conditions.
Guest Signature
GSO Signature
Duty Manager Signature
Enjoy your stay with us!
